color_story: H:120° is the mathematical center of the allowed 112°–128° band, guaranteed by R=B in every neutral hex. A single saturated green (#22A022) serves as primary accent, breaking through the page once—a 2px rule above the featured project—preventing decoration while maintaining focus. The violet secondary (S:20%) appears only in Band 4's editorial column, reading as editorial texture rather than signal. Spring paper (neutral-50) and forest shadow (neutral-800) create rhythm without coldness; the waxing gibbous at 85% illumination is felt through clean, unsmuddied contrast ratios (17:1+).
